dashboard.active_session_desc: You have an active session right now
dashboard.manual_draft_desc: You have a manual workout draft in progress. Do you want to continue editing or discard it to start a new live session?
dashboard.live_session_desc: You have a live session in progress. You cannot log past workouts until you finish or discard the current session.
dashboard.add_past_desc: Manual entry of an old session
dashboard.font_change_hint: * Changes are applied immediately to the entire interface.

setup.desc: First, let's set the date and mode for your session.
setup.live_date_hint: Live sessions always use the current date.

workout.notes_placeholder: How are you feeling today? Any specific goals...
workout.no_history: No previous records for this exercise.
workout.exercise_notes_placeholder: Details about form, seat position, etc...

progress.title: Workout History
progress.description: Review all your past workout sessions.
progress.no_workouts_desc: Your completed sessions will appear here.
progress.no_history_desc: Start a workout with this exercise to see your progress here.
progress.no_matching_exercises: No exercises found matching the selected muscle groups.

delete_workout.title: Delete Workout
delete_workout.message: Are you sure you want to delete this workout? This action cannot be undone.

delete_exercise.title: Delete Exercise
delete_exercise.message: Are you sure you want to delete "%name%"? This action cannot be undone.

finish_workout.title: Finish Workout
finish_workout.message: Do you want to mark the last exercise as finished before the end?
finish_workout.no: No - Delete unfinished sets and finish

finish_exercise.title: Finish Exercise
finish_exercise.message: Do you want to mark this exercise as finished?

remove_exercise.title: Remove Exercise
remove_exercise.message: Are you sure you want to remove this exercise from the session? All sets for it will be lost.

admin_migration.title: Exercise Migration
admin_migration.description: Replace your custom exercises with system ones while preserving your progress.
admin_migration.match_error: Error: Load type mismatch (e.g. kg vs levels).

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage application settings and global exercises

settings.title: General Settings
settings.subtitle: Control application-wide behavior and accessibility.
settings.public_desc: Anyone logged in can use the app. This is the standard operational mode.
settings.private_desc: Only administrators can access the application. Non-admins will see a maintenance message.

exercises.title: Global Exercises
exercises.subtitle: Standard exercises available to all users.
exercises.no_found_desc: Try adjusting your search or filters.
exercises.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this exercise? This action is irreversible and may affect workout history.

migration.title: Exercise Migration
migration.subtitle: Merge custom user exercises into the global database to standardize records.

import_export.title: Import / Export Exercises
import_export.subtitle: Export the exercise database to CSV, generate new guides with AI, and import them back.
import_export.export_desc: Generate a CSV containing the current exercises. You can use an AI externally (like Gemini) to fill or update the descriptions, then upload the file using the Import form.
import_export.include_custom: Include user-created custom exercises in the export
import_export.import_desc: Upload a CSV file with `;` delimiters and columns: `id;name;описание`. The system will update both the names and descriptions of matching exercises.
import_export.upload_or_drag: Click or drag a CSV file here to upload
import_export.no_file_selected: Please select a valid CSV file first.
